name: africa-ats-directory
description: Community-driven directory mapping African companies to their ATS platforms

scripts.setup-hooks: sh -c "if git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1; then git config core.hooksPath .githooks && echo Hooks path set to .githooks; else echo Not a git worktree here. Run this in your cloned git repo.; fi"
